description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a thick, rectangular wooden handle with a natural grain pattern and a solid, heavy metal head. The head is blocky and geometric, with flat striking faces on both ends and chamfered edges, suggesting it is designed for delivering powerful blows. The wood of the handle appears untreated or lightly finished, giving it a slightly rough, utilitarian look. The metal head is matte gray, showing subtle facets and a slightly worn texture, but no significant damage. The overall construction is simple and functional, with no visible branding or decorative elements. This hammer is well-suited for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as construction, demolition, or maintenance work.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a thick wooden handle and a solid, blocky metal head, designed for powerful striking tasks. The tool has a utilitarian, rugged appearance with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat face of the metal head and the full width of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the handle and the blocky, geometric profile of the metal head.
description_view_2: Top view displays the broad, rectangular striking surface of the head and the handle's attachment point.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other side of the head and handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a rectangular cross-section, visible natural grain, and a slightly rough, unfinished texture.
attribute_head_type: Blocky sledge-type head with flat striking faces on both ends and chamfered edges, made of solid steel.
